title: OHO ALJ Disposition Data (03) — Raw Rendered-HTML Capture (FY2025 YTD)
description: Raw rendered-HTML capture of SSA OHO's '03_ALJ_Disposition_Data' page, fetched 2026-05-05 via Playwright. A JSON envelope recording the fetch URL, timestamp, HTTP status, page title, table count, the captured HTML table(s), and page body text. This is the upstream source from which alj-disposition-by-judge-LATEST.csv (1,439 ALJ rows) was extracted; it is not itself a tidy table.

columns.name: tables
columns.description: Array of captured HTML table strings (one element: the rendered ALJ disposition table).

columns.name: bodyText
columns.description: Page body text capture (truncated at ~50000 chars).

notes: Computed: raw rendered-HTML capture (not the official published file format) saved by scripts/playwright-fetch.js; it is the extraction source for the tidy alj-disposition-by-judge-LATEST.csv. Period is FY2025 YTD (09/28/2024–09/26/2025), hence temporal_coverage 2024–2025. 'tables' holds a single HTML string (624 KB file), so no per-row schema applies; columns above describe the JSON envelope. Field meanings for the downstream table are documented in FIELD_DEFINITIONS.txt.
